modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about various question types available in Qualtrics.

full_description_text:  
User seeks clarification on the different types of questions that can be utilized in Qualtrics.  
This inquiry arises from a need to understand the capabilities of the platform for effective survey design.  
The user is likely preparing to create a survey and requires detailed information on question formats.
